nodes.name: Golden-tufted mountain grackle

nodes.name: 圭亚那

nodes.name: Golden-tufted mountain grackle
nodes.summary: The golden-tufted mountain grackle (Macroagelaius imthurni), also known as the golden-tufted grackle, is a species of bird in the family Icteridae. It is found in Brazil, Guyana, and Venezuela where its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
